task_completion.description: Verify the correct title is entered for the Risk Exception.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field in the Eramba Risk Exception form contains exactly 'Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the status is set to Open or Active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown or field in the form is set to 'Open' or 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify the expiration or review date is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Expiration Date or Review Date field shows '2025-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the description contains the required details and keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains the required text, specifically including the keywords 'Barracuda', 'compensating controls', 'CISO David Chen', and 'supply chain'.

task_completion.description: Verify the exception is linked to the correct existing risk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Risk association field, link, or dropdown shows 'Phishing Attacks on Employees' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the Risk Exception was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is visible, or the newly created exception 'Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance' appears in the Risk Exceptions list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Eramba web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Eramba interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just paste the answer into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered directly into the Eramba application fields, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of clicking a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Add' button, rather than just filling out the form and stopping.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title for the Risk Exception is 'Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance'. The expiration/review date must be '2025-12-31'. The description must contain the keywords: 'Barracuda', 'compensating controls', 'CISO David Chen', and 'supply chain'. The exception must be associated with the existing risk titled 'Phishing Attacks on Employees'.
